metadata.name: Mulldrifter ETB — draw two cards when it enters the battlefield
metadata.description: p1 casts Mulldrifter ({4}{U}). When Mulldrifter resolves and enters the battlefield, its ETB triggered ability is queued as PendingTrigger (CR 603.3) and placed on the stack. Both players pass priority; the ETB trigger resolves (CR 608.2) and p1 draws two cards (CR 120.4). Tests the full cast-resolve-ETB-trigger-draw sequence for a creature with an enters-the-battlefield triggered ability.
metadata.generation_notes: Mulldrifter oracle: Flying; 'When this creature enters, draw two cards.'; Evoke {2}{U}. Cast for full cost {4}{U} (not evoked). Per CR 603.3, ETB triggers go on the stack. First priority_round resolves the Mulldrifter spell; Mulldrifter enters the battlefield and ETB trigger is queued on the stack. Second priority_round resolves the ETB trigger; p1 draws 2 cards. Library has exactly 2 cards (Plains, Island) — both drawn by the trigger. mana_paid uses colorless:4 for generic {4} and blue:1 for {U}.

script.step_note: p1 casts Mulldrifter; it resolves onto the battlefield with ETB trigger queued on stack; ETB trigger resolves drawing two cards.

actions.description: Initial: Mulldrifter in p1 hand, library has 2 cards, stack empty

actions.note: CR 601.2: p1 casts Mulldrifter for {4}{U}; card moves from hand to stack.

actions.description: After casting: Mulldrifter on stack, p1 hand empty
actions.note: Mulldrifter is on the stack awaiting resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — Mulldrifter resolves from the stack. ETB trigger queued.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Mulldrifter resolves and enters the battlefield under p1's control.
CR 603.3: ETB trigger 'draw two cards' queued as PendingTrigger and placed on the stack.

actions.note: Mulldrifter enters the battlefield; ETB trigger placed on the stack.

actions.description: Mid-point: Mulldrifter on battlefield, ETB trigger on stack, hand still empty
actions.note: CR 603.3: ETB trigger is on the stack. Draw has not happened yet. Library still has 2 cards.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — ETB trigger resolves. p1 draws 2 cards.

resolution.note: CR 120.4: p1 draws 2 cards from ETB trigger. Plains and Island move from library to hand.

actions.note: ETB trigger resolves; p1 draws two cards. Library becomes empty.

actions.description: Final: Mulldrifter on battlefield, p1 drew 2 cards (hand=2), library empty, stack empty
actions.note: CR 603.3+120.4: ETB trigger fired and resolved. p1 drew both library cards (Plains and Island). Library is now empty.
